regions.text: There are 50,000,000 more people in Europe today than there were twenty-five years ago. The increase in population in twenty-five years is 50,000,000. Europe has increased her population by 50,000,000 in the last twenty-five years.
This map gives a picture of the number of people in each country of Europe today. Legend: less than 1 million, 1-6 millions, 6-11 millions, 11-36 millions, 36-70 millions.
ago: before now, before the present. increase: amount by which something gets greater. each: every, all, one by one.
FUTURE: will increase. PRESENT: increase(s). PAST: increased.
